{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323153455FC163489C03CB2DB695C"}"},"total":4792},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7352438413543146265","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看的！真在💩里淘到金了。在🍅看的真正意义上的第一本大女主文。作者该往隔壁投，🍅的受众更多是豪门甜宠，诙谐沙雕这类，不比隔壁女帝基建文有市场的（参考魏晋，虽然创亖人）。
而且文笔真的好，正经里带点幽默，严肃情节里突然逗我一笑。剧情安排也好（忽略我的词穷），从无到有，一步一步，收编整顿，衣食住行，地区势力，抵抗外敌，明白清楚地写出来。给我一种我也跟着卫大佬一起混的感觉。
卫曦音，个人能力这点不说了，去看文就知道了，真的会被卫姐狠狠拿捏，最关键的是她名字好听！（不知道有木有人能懂我这个点）另外作者有好好给角色取名字，不管是男角色还是女角色。","text_exts":[{"e":31,"s":28,"text":"大女主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774251295B2DB695C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227352438413543146265%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227206121044766100538%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%A5%B3%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1711876665,"group_id":"7206121044766100538","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"下了就不能再推了哦","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4JwI00cqTK9EZQ9lgZJDQgyPpvLIpFESi+I3blPktlJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/062f61d64ee247d0858f8643a731d783~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787634&x-signature=%2FKQfUuJCqpOyNaR68taTKU6%2BWAQ%3D","user_id":"1885015239043404","user_name":"差评+1"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1885015239043404","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7206121044766100538","book_info":{"abstract":"【大女主+天灾+丧尸+基建+无异能+无cp】
卫曦音穿越了，胎穿成一名世家大族的贵族嫡女，原本以为自己手握宅斗剧本，谁曾想回乡途中遭遇丧尸爆发。
紧接着动植物变异，极端天气出现。
世界观在顷刻间崩塌。
这里没有车，没有干粮罐头，没有高科技武器以及各种生活物资……
卫曦音不由仰天长叹，“既然都穿越了，老天爷为什么不干脆赏我个金手指！”
没办法，她只得撸起袖子加油干，努力带领全族在末世生存下去。
注：古代丧尸基建文，成长型女主。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/550c475a84708377a21fb80559319c62","author":"玖菜花叶","author_id":"","book_id":"7206121044766100538","book_name":"丧尸天灾：古代末世生存指南","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0f0f0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":88,"name":"嫡女","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=88&name=嫡女&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":876,"name":"胎穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=876&name=胎穿&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7206121845446148669","read_count":"28987","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1015954"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"476","tags":"种田,古代言情,穿越,末世,嫡女,无CP,基建,胎穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ee7d3b0d792529a32c4b293569b3d741~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435295&x-signature=uCu1%2B7am%2FowfgZHBIiiMIGHWmzM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"857261806722798","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1499"},"log_extr
